criteria.label: Compute derivatives using sum, product, power and chain rules on polynomial-exponential mixes.
criteria.example: Differentiate f(x)=x²e^x to get f′(x)=e^x(2x+x²); verify at x=1 with a finite difference.

criteria.label: Interpret f′(x) as instantaneous rate of change in a word problem.
criteria.example: Given h(t)=-4.9t²+20t, compute h′(2) and explain it as vertical velocity at t=2 s.

criteria.label: Use autograd to obtain dL/dw for a scalar loss and perform one gradient descent step.
criteria.example: For L(w)=(w-3)², w=2, η=0.1: gradient -2, update w to 2.2.
